name: Mirei Shikishima
description: A child soldier that arrives at Mermaid Island on the same day as Mamori. Quickly establishing herself as a powerful Liberator, Mirei can be mistaken as cruel due to her stunted social skills and intimidating appearance. In reality, she is kindhearted and stoic unless Mamori is being bullied or threatened.

name: Misono Arisuin
description: At first meet, he seems to be arrogant, impolite and cold towards others. This only covers up his otherwise kind and caring personality. Despite his offbeat and arrogant character, Misono is shown to care for his friends deeply. Because he was very lonely in his childhood without a single friend, he now cherishes his new friends very much, especially Mahiru Shirota, who was his first true friend. name: Piano-chan
description: A Sanrio character who was originally created in 1970's, she appears with other My Melody-related characters in the 2005 anime Onegai My Melody and its sequels. Her appearance is that of a sheep with pink wool. Unlike My Melo's other animal friends, she doesn't speak in human words, but by bleating instead. name: Replica
description: Replica is Yuuma's Guardian. He often guides him and give him advices. However, he does not interfere with Yuuma's decision. He also assists him during battles like preparing him certain seals to make Yuuma's attack more complicated.

name: Samon Gokuu
description: __Height:__ 173 cm / 5.67 ft The head supervisor of Nanba Prison's Building 5.

name: Seijuurou Hiko
description: The thirteenth successor to the sword art of Hiten Mitsurugi-Ryu, Hiko Seijuro saved young Shinta from marauding bandits who killed his companions. Hiko then took care of Shinta, and renamed him Kenshin ("Heart of Sword") after claiming that Shinta was not a good name for a swordsman. He became angry and disappointed with Kenshin, because he ran away to join the rebellion against the Tokugawa regime. description: Shinsuke was just a traveling ronin when he met Jinka and Tama. He was fascinated with their abilities and offered information to be able to follow them.

name: Sutea Kouroya
description: Sutea is a childhood friend of Koshi Nagumo. She has a crush on Koushi and easily gets worried about him, but acts like she isn't. She has a heat sensitive body and dislikes being touched. ~!When she revealed that to young Koushi, he ended up cooling his hands with ice before touching her.!~

name: Tadaomi Shirotani
description: Occupation: Secretary Shirotani works in the Tosawa Corporation. He suffers from mysophobia since he was a child. He has short strawberry blonde hair. His eyes are in a light shade of brown and he has a mole under his right eye. Outside he wears a suit with gloves, many times covered with long beige jacket He is seen as rude, inconsiderate or even arrogant person, but he really has a low self-esteem and deeply cares about others. name: Tanjurou Kamado
description: Tanjuro Kamadou was the husband of Kie Kamado and the late father of Tanjiro, Nezuko, Takeo, Hanako, Shigeru, and Rokuta. Tanjuro was a quiet, calculating, forgiving, charismatic and loving person. He had a peaceful relationship with his family and regularly lectured Tanjiro about life. While he appeared calm on the outside, he showed a decent, noble aura with a quiet perception to his surroundings. name: Tina Isemi
description: Tina is a 2nd year student at Oushin Girls' Academy. She's referred to as Oushin's Prince due to her tall and androgynous appearance. In actuality, she has low self confidence and acts the way other people want her to be, and she wants to change that about herself.

name: Tsukumo
description: __Height:__ 180 cm __ID:__ 1399 Tsukumo was arrested for trespassing and, after breaking out of previous prisons, was sent to Nanba. He was originally placed in Building 13, Cell 13, but was later transferred to Cell 11. Tsukumo claims to be a shinobi, though his skills are lacking. He is later revealed to be a high-profile actor who was born into a shinobi village. His parents had vanished when he was young. Disillusioned with his acting career, Tsukumo was determined to return to his village,

name: Yu Han Sung
description: Yu Han Sung is an Advanced Ranker and the former Test Director of the Second Floor. Notably, he is a key member of FUG in taking Viole to the top. He is the main antagonist of Part I. He is a well known ranker partly because he rejected becoming a High Ranker.

name: Ageha Hijiri
description: Ageha is kindhearted, sisterly and has a soft spot for younger children. Her childhood friend is [Nijigaoka Mashiro](https://anilist.co/character/296118/Mashiro-Nijigaoka) and she acts as an older sister to her.

name: Ai Mikaze
description: __Height:__ 178 cm __Instrument:__ Synthesizer The senpai of Syo Kurusu and Natsuki Shinomiya. Mentioned in UtaPri: All Stars: ~! Mikaze is actually a 'musical cyborg' created, modeled after, & to a certain degree is still mentally linked to a former Saotome academy student; Ai'ne. Ai'ne also happens to be a classmate from Reiji's year/class but was in some sort of accident that put him into an indefinite coma.!~

name: Alto Goldfield
